item.title: The Mystery of the Embalmed Head in the Woods ��
item.description: An overview of the Beaver County Jane Doe case, where unusual remains were discovered in the woods, and the ongoing efforts to identify the individual and understand what happened.

media:content.media:title: The Mystery of the Embalmed Head in the Woods ��
media:content.media:description: An overview of the Beaver County Jane Doe case, where unusual remains were discovered in the woods, and the ongoing efforts to identify the individual and understand what happened.

item.title: Home Invasion Gone Wrong Or Calculated Murder? Amy Gellert's Case
item.description: A look at the Amy Gellert case, examining the circumstances, investigation findings, and the questions about whether it was a targeted act or a tragic coincidence.

media:content.media:title: Home Invasion Gone Wrong Or Calculated Murder? Amy Gellert's Case
media:content.media:description: A look at the Amy Gellert case, examining the circumstances, investigation findings, and the questions about whether it was a targeted act or a tragic coincidence.

item.title: New Clues in Old Cases: You’ll Want to Know
item.description: An update on the Julie Doe case, exploring recent developments, new evidence, and what these findings could mean for the long-running investigation.

media:content.media:title: New Clues in Old Cases: You’ll Want to Know
media:content.media:description: An update on the Julie Doe case, exploring recent developments, new evidence, and what these findings could mean for the long-running investigation.

item.title: College Student DISAPPEARED From Dorm Room
item.description: A look at the disappearance of college student Ronald Tammen, focusing on the timeline, search efforts, and the unanswered questions that remain.

media:content.media:title: College Student DISAPPEARED From Dorm Room
media:content.media:description: A look at the disappearance of college student Ronald Tammen, focusing on the timeline, search efforts, and the unanswered questions that remain.
